Great salespeople are like magicians. They're interesting to be around. You you can't sense pressure. You just sense this person's special. They know how to maximize time. They know how to maximize opportunity. They don't waste time on trivial things. They get more done than other people do. They resolve conflict when it seems impossible. They're master unbelievable negotiators. They can win people over even people that aren't winnable. They're they're magicians. They're completely skilled in their craft of communication and convincing and negotiating and problem-solving and resolution. Look, the great salespeople don't even look like salespeople. They look like something magical. Something special is taking place.
